title: dryopteris molliuscula
intro: Dryopteris molliuscula, also known as the spotted wood fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris molliuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
